briefdescription.para: Enumeration for mapping keyboard and mouse button event keycodes to platform specific codes. @SINCE_1_0.0.
The integer dimensions of an image or a region of an image packed into 16 bits per component.

detaileddescription.para: This can only be used for images of up to 65535 x 65535 pixels. @SINCE_2_5.14

briefdescription.para: The position and size of the render surface.
Checks if a key event is for a specific DALI KEY.

detaileddescription.para:
@SINCE_1_0.0
keyEvent
reference to a keyEvent structure
daliKey
Dali key enum
true if the key is matched, false if not

Create a GifLoading with the given url and resourceType.
url
The url of the animated image to load
isLocalResource
The true or false whether this is a local resource.
A newly created GifLoading.

briefdescription.para: Downcast an Object handle to Capture handle.

detaileddescription.para: If handle points to a Capture object the downcast produces valid handle. If not the returned handle is left uninitialized.

simplesect.para: handle to a Capture object or an uninitialized handle.

briefdescription.para: Load a frame of the animated image.

simplesect.para: This function will load the entire animated image into memory if not already loaded.

parameterdescription.para: The width and height to fit the loaded image to.
The FittingMode of the resource to load
The SamplingMode of the resource to load

simplesect.para: Dali::Devel::PixelBuffer The loaded PixelBuffer. If loading is fail, return empty handle.

briefdescription.para: Load frame planes of the animated image.

simplesect.para: This function will load the entire animated image into memory if not already loaded.

parameterdescription.para: The loaded PixelBuffer list. If loading is fail, return empty list.
The width and height to fit the loaded image to.

simplesect.para: true if loading succeeded, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get the size of a animated image.

simplesect.para: The width and height in pixels of the animated image.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of frames in this animated image.
Get the frame interval of the frame index.

simplesect.para: The frame is needed to be loaded before this function is called.
The time interval of the frame(microsecond).

briefdescription.para: Get the animated image file URL.

simplesect.para: The URL string of the animated image file

briefdescription.para: Return whether the animated image loading is succeeded or not.

simplesect.para: True when the animated image loading is succeeded.
